query: SELECT a.id, cv.title, cv.uploadDate, a.analysisResult FROM analyses a JOIN channelVideos cv ON cv.analysisId = a.id WHERE cv.uploadDate >= '2026-03-09' ORDER BY cv.uploadDate DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT a.id, cv.title, cv.uploadDate, a.analysisResult FROM analyses a JOIN channelVideos cv ON cv.analysisId = a.id WHERE cv.uploadDate >= '2026-03-09' ORDER BY cv.uploadDate DESC;

Maintain liquidity (30-40% of portfolio) to capitalize on market corrections. Don't just look at potential profits; always consider potential losses. The graph reflects all actions and decisions of market participants. Focus on technical analysis rather than news-driven emotional decisions. Trend changes are dynamic; support and resistance levels don't hold forever. Be selective with trades, especially when many options are available."}
